AlligatorSkiingMignetteDesc.Text: Tap the screen to jump over obstacles and collect golden alligator teeth!

AnnounceCharacterBob.Text: Bob is here! And his teddy bear, Tim, is all sandy! Everyone loves Bob, so you better make it up to him, quick. Work your magic, Phil!

AnnounceCharacterKevin.Text: Kevin has arrived! He's still upset that you ruined his vacation, but he'll hopefully cheer up when you give him his sweet Welcome Basket!

AnnounceCharacterStuart.Text: You should cheer up Stuart after his long, cold swim. He'd be great to have at your parties, since he's way more popular than you are right now.

AnnounceCharacterStuart$5.0.Text: You should cheer up Stuart after his long, cold swim. Quick, give him the welcome basket and tell him about the party!

AnnounceMinionBeeDo.Text: Phil! It's an angry shark with a laser on its head! Oh, wait. It's Bee-Do. Help him out with one of your Welcome Baskets.

AnnounceMinionCostumeBeedo.Text: Phil! It's an angry shark with a laser on its head! Oh, wait. It's Bee-Do. Help him out with one of your Welcome Baskets.

AnnounceMinionCostumeFrenchMaid.Text: French Maid is here, and he's very upset. That swim in the ocean has ruined his dress! Better hope one of your Welcome Baskets does the trick.

AnnounceMinionFrenchMaid.Text: French Maid is here, and he's very upset. That swim in the ocean has ruined his dress! Better hope one of your Welcome Baskets does the trick.

AnnounceMinionSet1.Text: A few of your buddies have just arrived! And that unexpected swim didn't help their mood. Time to cheer them up with your Tiki Lounge!

AnnounceMinionSet2.Text: More Minions have arrived! Word of your awesome parties must have traveled across the ocean! Or else your buddies just heard the super loud music.

AnnounceMinions1.Text: Look, Phil! More buddies! That wild party of yours must have got their attention.

AnnounceMinions10.Text: More buddies! They must have heard about your parties! Because there's definitely no other reason they'd want to stop aimlessly floating in the ocean.

AnnounceMinions11.Text: Here come more of your buddies! The more parties, the more Minions!

AnnounceMinions12.Text: More Minions are here! Either they got tired of clinging to cruise ship wreckage, or they heard about your epic parties! Or both.

AnnounceMinions13.Text: Hey, Phil! More of your buddies have arrived! They must have seen one of your awesome parties from the ocean.  Keep throwing more parties to attract more buddies!

AnnounceMinions14.Text: Phil, look! More of your buddies are here! They must've heard about your amazing parties! Either that or a shark tried to eat them.

AnnounceMinions15.Text: Look, Phil! More buddies! That wild party of yours must have got their attention.

AnnounceMinions16.Text: More buddies are here! They can't wait to party with you, Phil! And they REALLY can't wait to put on dry overalls.

AnnounceMinions17.Text: Phil, more of your buddies have arrived! They're sunburned, waterlogged, and heat-stricken. But more importantly, they're ready to party!  Better start working on throwing another one.

AnnounceMinions18.Text: More Minions have arrived! They're so excited to be here on the island. Especially since the alternative is being stranded in the middle of the ocean.

AnnounceMinions19.Text: Here come more of your buddies! The more parties, the more Minions!

AnnounceMinions2.Text: Minions are still arriving on the island! They like what you've done with the place… and are excited for your next party!

AnnounceMinions3.Text: Look, Phil! More buddies! That wild party of yours must have got their attention.

AnnounceMinions4.Text: More of your buddies are showing up! And they all want to be on the guest list for your next Minion bash!

AnnounceMinions5.Text: More buddies are here! They can't wait to party with you, Phil! And they REALLY can't wait to put on dry overalls.

AnnounceMinions6.Text: The Minions just keep on coming... and it's all thanks to your awesome parties! So you better get back to work on planning the next one!

AnnounceMinions7.Text: More Minions are here! Either they got tired of clinging to cruise ship wreckage, or they heard about your epic parties! Or both.

AnnounceMinions8.Text: Look, Phil! It's another batch of buddies! And they want you to celebrate their arrival the only way you now how -- by throwing an epic party!

AnnounceMinions9.Text: Here come more of your buddies! The more parties, the more Minions!

UsageSharingDisableDesc.Text:
In addition to information that you give EA directly, EA collects certain information for purposes of improving our products and services, providing services to you, facilitating the provision of software updates, dynamically served content and product support, communicating with you as well as enhancing your experience when using EA products and services.  This data will not be shared with any third party in a way that can identify you. When you disable usage data sharing, in addition to anonymous data, EA will continue collecting data reasonably necessary to operate the products and services.

CHANGES WILL BE REFLECTED IN YOUR NEXT GAME PLAY SESSION.

UsageSharingEnableDesc.Text:
Sharing of usage statistics has been disabled for the game. In addition to information that you give EA directly, EA collects certain information for purposes of improving our products and services, providing services to you, facilitating the provision of software updates, dynamically served content and product support, communicating with you as well as enhancing your experience when using EA products and services. This data will not be shared with any third party in a way that can identify you.  When you disable usage data sharing, in addition to anonymous data, EA will continue collecting data reasonably necessary to operate the products and services.

CHANGES WILL BE REFLECTED IN YOUR NEXT GAME PLAY SESSION.

didyouknow_MagnetFinger.Text: You can select all your Minions by tapping and holding your finger on the ground. Release them all by double tapping the ground after.

didyouknow_MoveBuilding.Text: You can tap and hold buildings to move them. Try it!

didyouknow_MultiMinionTap.Text: You can tap additional Minions to select them. Try it!

didyouknow_PutBuildingInInventory.Text: You can tap and hold buildings to store them in inventory. Try it!

ftue_01_commentarySign.Text: "Phil's." It's simple, it's elegant, and most importantly, your buddies will always know where to find you.

ftue_01_end.Text: Look, Phil! I made a place for you to track your success. Every time it goes up, it's like I'm putting one of your drawings on the fridge.

ftue_01_goHaveFun.Text: A beach picnic is a nice first step, but you sank an entire cruise ship, Phil. You're going to need to throw a much bigger party than that to make it up to them.

ftue_01_intro.Text: Your buddies are on their way, and they are NOT happy you ruined their vacation. This uninhabited island is about to be inhabited with angry Minions!

ftue_01_missingSign.Text: You should give your new Tiki Lounge the coolest name you can possibly imagine. Think, Phil, think!

ftue_01_tiki_complete.Text: Good start, Phil! No one can stay mad at you when they're sitting at a tropical Tiki Lounge. That's just science!

ftue_01_tikibar.Text: Here's your chance to redeem yourself, Phil. Turn this island into a Minions Paradise! All you need are snacks, games, gadgets... hmm, this isn't going to be easy! You better get to work!

ftue_03_end.Text: Wow! Most people would describe this as excessive, but I admire your passion, Phil.

ftue_03_start.Text: You should build a place to store these coconuts. Once you have somewhere to store stuff, you have an excuse to get even more stuff!

ftue_05_prep.Text: Stuart's not the only buddy who needs a welcome basket - more are on the way! What's the plan to track everything your buddies need, Phil?

ftue_05_start.Text: Phil, look! You can see Stuart through your binoculars. It'll take him a little while to swim here, so you should prepare for his arrival.

ftue_alligator_narrative_01.Text: If you want to create a Minions paradise, Stuart suggests finding more cool things to do here. Send a buddy out to explore some of the island's undiscovered fun spots.

ftue_alligator_narrative_01$5.0.Text: You still have some party planning to do... but your buddies want to have fun right now! Send one out to explore the island for fun new activities.

ftue_alligator_narrative_02.Text: You accidentally discovered alligator skiing! If that doesn't deserve a party, what does? Use the Piñata to earn more Party Points – then throw your next party!

ftue_alligator_narrative_02$5.0.Text: Your buddies are ready to party! All you have to do is earn more Party Points, by using the piñata. The harder you smash, the bigger your bash!

ftue_coach_make_stuff.Text: Tap to open the Make Stuff menu.

ftue_coach_open_store.Text: Tap to Open the Store Menu.

ftue_coach_other_stuff.Text: Tap to open the Other Stuff menu.

ftue_coach_place_building.Text: Tap, Hold, and then Drag to place object.

ftue_coach_task_phil.Text: Tap to select Phil and click on the Banana Farm to task him.

ftue_fillorder_narrative_01.Text: Great job, Phil! Tap on the Celebration Station to keep track of what you need to prepare for Stuart's Welcome Basket.

ftue_fillorder_narrative_02.Text: Stuart's almost here! Visit the Celebration Station one more time to get one last item before greeting him.

ftue_leisure_narrative_01.Text: While you think up some party ideas, why not let your buddies take out some of their post-shipwreck frustration on a Piñata? It's therapy and candy!

ftue_leisure_narrative_02.Text: Having your buddies use fun stuff around the island – like the Piñata – earns you Party Points!

ftue_leisure_narrative_03.Text: The Party Bar is here! Fill it with Party Points by completing quests, placing decorations, even playing mini-games. When it fills up: it's time to party!

ftue_leisure_narrative_04.Text: Doubloons help you do everything faster. Use these free Doubloons on the Piñata to earn your Party Points even quicker!

ftue_orderboard_narrative_01.Text: Look, Phil! You can see Stuart through your binoculars. It'll take him a bit to swim here. Maybe you can prepare a Welcome Basket for when he arrives.

ftue_orderboard_narrative_01$5.0.Text: That stage is perfect! Stuart and your other buddies will be angry when they arrive, considering you ruined their vacation. Good thing everyone loves a Welcome Basket.

ftue_orderboard_narrative_02.Text: You need a place where you can see which of your buddies is floating closest to the island, and track what you need to make them a personalized Welcome Basket.

ftue_q2_coaching_01.Text: Tap the Minion to select him.

ftue_q2_narrative_01.Text: Your buddies worked up an appetite bashing that Piñata, which means it's the perfect time to ask them to grab some Coconuts! Nutritious, delicious, and currently your only option.

ftue_q2_narrative_02.Text: Now that your buddies are in a better mood, ask them for help so you can focus on creating a better Minions Paradise!

ftue_q2_narrative_03.Text: Now that your buddies are in a better mood, ask them for help so you can focus on creating a better Minions Paradise!

ftue_q2_narrative_04.Text: Have some more free Doubloons to get Coconuts even faster for your hungry buddies. There's no point in hoarding your Doubloons like some eccentric billionaire!

ftue_q2_narrative_06.Text: Sweet jeepers! At this rate, you'll have a bunch of coconuts in no time. You'll need a place to store them!

ftue_q2_narrative_funflow.Text: A beach picnic is a nice first step, but you sank an entire cruise ship, Phil. You're going to need to throw a much bigger party than that to make it up to them.

ftue_q4_narrative_01.Text: Wonderful! Let's get that coconut into storage.

ftue_q4_narrative_02.Text: Let's use that coconut for your Minion buddies!

ftue_q6_narrative_01.Text: Your island hasn't reached peak awesomeness yet. Fill more orders on the Celebration Station to earn more Sand Dollars, so you can build more cool stuff!

ftue_q6_order.Text:
Greet Stuart with a Welcome Basket by selecting an order on the left! 

It's impossible to stay mad at someone when they give you a welcome basket.

ftue_q8_narrative_01.Text: Normally, Stuart would be happy to see you. Except that you sank the boat right when he was going to perform onstage.

ftue_q8_narrative_02.Text: That's another great idea, Phil. You can build Stuart a stage!

ftue_q8_narrative_03.Text: There's Swamp Gas in Florida, so we're going to need to build a way to harvest the swamp gas.

ftue_q8_narrative_04.Text: Luckily for us, we have a store that sells everything you'll need and probably some stuff you don't, but want anyway.

ftue_q8_narrative_05.Text: Open the Store to find the Swamp Gas Base Resource Building.

ftue_q8_narrative_06.Text: There's Swamp Gas in Florida, so we're going to need to build a way to harvest the swamp gas.

ftue_stage_repair_intro.SourceComment: Intro dialog text for Phil's repair stage quest
ftue_stage_repair_intro.Text: Look, Phil! You can see Stuart through your binoculars and he doesn't look happy. You should plan a party just for him. You'll need some place to celebrate him as the Guest of Honor!

ftue_start_party_intro.Text: Your Party Bar is full, which means you've earned enough points for an epic Minion Bash!

ftue_storage_narrative_01.Text: Not bad for your first party! But with more Minions on the way, you'll need a place to store supplies for the epic celebrations yet to come.

harvestAction.SourceComment: context in game where text appears test

harvestTaskDesc.SourceComment: context in game where text appears test

kevin_arrival_01.Text: Kevin thinks your buddies will need Villains to be truly happy! You should build some place for vacationing Villains to stay and a spot for Kevin to greet them.

kevin_arrival_01$7.0.Text: Kevin thinks this paradise is missing one thing: A Villain Lair! Access the Lair to help Villains carry out their Master Plans.

key_villain_flux_dialog_farewell.Text: Farewell, Minions, your services were almost adequate.

key_villain_flux_dialog_welcome.Text: Professor Flux just arrived... from the future! Or possibly the past. Either way, it's time to help him relax!

key_villain_frankie_dialog_farewell.Text: As far as vacations go, it could have used more sushi.

key_villain_frankie_dialog_welcome.Text: Frankie Fishlips has arrived, fresh off of another epic heist. Now it's time to help him relax and kick his fins up!

key_villain_spikey_dialog_farewell.Text: Thank you, Minions! I'm leaving this rock for more dastardly deeds elsewhere!

key_villain_spikey_dialog_welcome.Text: Mr. Spikey is here! He may look like a giant blowfish, but he means business. Get to work, Phil!

key_villain_wrestler_dialog_farewell.Text: I would stay to impress you all with my strength, but I see more islands to explore.

key_villain_wrestler_dialog_welcome.Text: Glam Slammer is here, so it's time to help him kick back. And if he asks for a smoothie, don't forget the protein powder!

leisureAction.SourceComment: context in game where text appears test

leisureTaskDesc.SourceComment: context in game where text appears test

mignetteTaskDescWrap.SourceComment: Will be combined with mignetteTaskDesc to form e.g. Alligator Skiing 1 Time!

partyBuffDetail_CURRENCY.Text: Get more Sand Dollars at the Celebration Station!

partyBuffDetail_PRODUCTION.Text: Speed up item collection and crafting!

partyBuffMultiplier.SourceComment: Shows how many times it is multiplied

partyMeterPulsingDialog.Text: (Placeholder) Forget everything you know about level up. The heart of this game is Minions having fun!

placePinataDialog.Text: (Placeholder) Working isn't fun, parties are fun. What a brilliant idea Phil!

populationBenefitQuestIntroDialog.SourceComment: THIS VERSION IS INVALID AND NOT USED
populationBenefitQuestIntroDialog.Text: Level-Up a few more of your buddies. The added benefits will help your paradise flourish!

populationBenefitQuestIntroDialogText.Text: Level-Up a few more of your buddies. The added benefits will help your paradise flourish!

qc2000000001_step1.SourceComment: Quest Chain: STU'S GOT THE BLUES Id: 2000000001 Step: 1 Item:  Tasks: [Turn-In,Coconut - Ingredients (Coconut),3],[Mini-Game,Fishing Frenzy - Mignette (AlligatorSkiingMignette),1]

qc2000000001_step1_description.SourceComment: Quest Chain: Stu's Got the Blues Id: 2000000001 Step: 1 Item: description Tasks: [Harvest,Coconut - Ingredients (Coconut),1]
qc2000000001_step1_description.Text: Stuart was supposed to play a big show for his buddies on the cruise ship before it sank. Phil tries to make him feel better.

qc2000000001_step1_intro.SourceComment: Quest Chain: STU'S GOT THE BLUES Id: 2000000001 Step: 1 Item: intro Tasks: [Turn-In,Coconut - Ingredients (Coconut),3],[Mini-Game,Fishing Frenzy - Mignette (AlligatorSkiingMignette),1]
qc2000000001_step1_intro.Text: Use these free Doubloons to speed up harvesting by adding a third buddy! Minions tend to do funnier things when they're in threes.

qc2000000001_step1_outro.SourceComment: Quest Chain: STU'S GOT THE BLUES Id: 2000000001 Step: 1 Item: outro Tasks: [Turn-In,Coconut - Ingredients (Coconut),3]

qc2000000001_step1_voice.SourceComment: Quest Chain: Stu's Got the Blues Id: 2000000001 Step: 1 Item: voice Tasks: [Harvest,Coconut - Ingredients (Coconut),1]
qc2000000001_step1_voice.Text: Get Stuart a coconut while you think of a plan!

qc2000000001_step2.SourceComment: Quest Chain: STU'S GOT THE BLUES Id: 2000000001 Step: 2 Item:  Tasks: [Place,Gaseous Swamp - Resource (ResourceSwampGas),1]

qc2000000001_step2_intro.SourceComment: Quest Chain: STU'S GOT THE BLUES Id: 2000000001 Step: 2 Item: intro Tasks: [Place,Gaseous Swamp - Resource (ResourceSwampGas),1]
qc2000000001_step2_intro.Text: Stuart wants toasted coconut. And toasted coconut he shall have! All you have to do is figure out how to make toasted coconut on a desert island...

qc2000000001_step2_outro.SourceComment: Quest Chain: STU'S GOT THE BLUES Id: 2000000001 Step: 2 Item: outro Tasks: [Place,Gaseous Swamp - Resource (ResourceSwampGas),1]
qc2000000001_step2_outro.Text: Good job, Phil! Harnessing the power of Swamp Gas is definitely a unique way to go.

qc2000000001_step2_voice.SourceComment: Quest Chain: Stu's Got the Blues Id: 2000000001 Step: 2 Item: voice Tasks: [Place,Swamp Gas Collector - Resource (ResourceSwampGas),1]

qc2000000001_step3.SourceComment: Quest Chain: STU'S GOT THE BLUES Id: 2000000001 Step: 3 Item:  Tasks: [Harvest,Swamp Gas - Ingredients (SwampGas),2]

qc2000000001_step3_intro.SourceComment: Quest Chain: STU'S GOT THE BLUES Id: 2000000001 Step: 3 Item: intro Tasks: [Harvest,Swamp Gas - Ingredients (SwampGas),2]
qc2000000001_step3_intro.Text: Swamp gas - what a weird, but brilliant, idea! Now just gather the ingredients you'll need for toasted coconut.

qc2000000001_step3_outro.SourceComment: Quest Chain: STU'S GOT THE BLUES Id: 2000000001 Step: 3 Item: outro Tasks: [Harvest,Swamp Gas - Ingredients (SwampGas),2]
qc2000000001_step3_outro.Text: Good job?! (We put in the question mark for added suspense.)

qc2000000001_step3_voice.SourceComment: Quest Chain: Stu's Got the Blues Id: 2000000001 Step: 3 Item: voice Tasks: [Harvest,Swamp Gas - Ingredients (SwampGas),3]
qc2000000001_step3_voice.Text: Collect Swamp Gas from the Swamp Gas Collector.

qc2000000001_step4.SourceComment: Quest Chain: STU'S GOT THE BLUES Id: 2000000001 Step: 4 Item:  Tasks: [Place,Weapons Depot - Crafting (CraftingWeapon),1],[Turn-In,Toasted Coconut - Dynamic_ingredients (ToastedCoconut),1]

qc2000000001_step4_intro.SourceComment: Quest Chain: STU'S GOT THE BLUES Id: 2000000001 Step: 4 Item: intro Tasks: [Place,Weapons Depot - Crafting (CraftingWeapon),1],[Turn-In,Toasted Coconut - Dynamic_ingredients (ToastedCoconut),1]
qc2000000001_step4_intro.Text: Now that we have everything we need, we are on an express train to Toasted Coconut City! Which is a metaphorical city full of toasted coconut!

qc2000000001_step4_outro.SourceComment: Quest Chain: STU'S GOT THE BLUES Id: 2000000001 Step: 4 Item: outro Tasks: [Place,Weapons Depot - Crafting (CraftingWeapon),1],[Turn-In,Toasted Coconut - Dynamic_ingredients (ToastedCoconut),1]
qc2000000001_step4_outro.Text: You did it! This Toasted Coconut looks delicious. A little charred, but tasty.

qc2000000001_step4_voice.SourceComment: Quest Chain: Stu's Got the Blues Id: 2000000001 Step: 4 Item: voice Tasks: [Place,Weapons Depot - Crafting (CraftingWeapon),1],[Turn-In,Toasted Coconut - Dynamic_ingredients (ToastedCoconut),1]
qc2000000001_step4_voice.Text: Place the Weapons Depot and then make Toasted Coconut for Stuart.

qc2000000001_step5.SourceComment: Quest Chain: STU'S GOT THE BLUES Id: 2000000001 Step: 5 Item:  Tasks: [Harvest,Swamp Gas - Ingredients (SwampGas),2]

qc2000000001_step5_intro.SourceComment: Quest Chain: STU'S GOT THE BLUES Id: 2000000001 Step: 5 Item: intro Tasks: [Harvest,Swamp Gas - Ingredients (SwampGas),2]
qc2000000001_step5_intro.Text: Stuart would love for you to find a way to make him pyrotechnics for his shows. Nothing says "I love you, buddy!" like explosives.

qc2000000001_step5_outro.SourceComment: Quest Chain: STU'S GOT THE BLUES Id: 2000000001 Step: 5 Item: outro Tasks: [Harvest,Swamp Gas - Ingredients (SwampGas),2]
qc2000000001_step5_outro.Text: Great work! You can use the Weapon Depot to make explosives and weapons.

qc2000000001_step5_voice.SourceComment: Quest Chain: Stu's Got the Blues Id: 2000000001 Step: 5 Item: voice Tasks: [Harvest,Swamp Gas - Ingredients (SwampGas),1]
qc2000000001_step5_voice.Text: Harvest some resources while you think of ways to use your new Weapons Depot.

qc2000000001_step6.SourceComment: Quest Chain: STU'S GOT THE BLUES Id: 2000000001 Step: 6 Item:  Tasks: [Harvest,Coconut - Ingredients (Coconut),3],[Harvest,Swamp Gas - Ingredients (SwampGas),1]

qc2000000001_step6_intro.SourceComment: Quest Chain: STU'S GOT THE BLUES Id: 2000000001 Step: 6 Item: intro Tasks: [Harvest,Coconut - Ingredients (Coconut),3],[Harvest,Swamp Gas - Ingredients (SwampGas),1]
qc2000000001_step6_intro.Text: You don't exactly know how to make pyrotechnics, but I bet you can figure it out through trial and error! Hopefully not too much error.

qc2000000001_step6_outro.SourceComment: Quest Chain: STU'S GOT THE BLUES Id: 2000000001 Step: 6 Item: outro Tasks: [Harvest,Coconut - Ingredients (Coconut),2],[Harvest,Swamp Gas - Ingredients (SwampGas),1]

qc2000000001_step6_voice.SourceComment: Quest Chain: Stu's Got the Blues Id: 2000000001 Step: 6 Item: voice Tasks: [Harvest,Coconut - Ingredients (Coconut),2],[Harvest,Swamp Gas - Ingredients (SwampGas),1]

qc2000000001_step7.SourceComment: Quest Chain: STU'S GOT THE BLUES Id: 2000000001 Step: 7 Item:  Tasks: [Turn-In,Grenade - Ingredients (GrenadeCraftable),1]

qc2000000001_step7_intro.SourceComment: Quest Chain: STU'S GOT THE BLUES Id: 2000000001 Step: 7 Item: intro Tasks: [Turn-In,Grenade - Ingredients (GrenadeCraftable),1]
qc2000000001_step7_intro.Text: Mix the coconuts and swamp gas together in the Weapons Depot! That is a sentence nobody has ever said before!

qc2000000001_step7_outro.SourceComment: Quest Chain: STU'S GOT THE BLUES Id: 2000000001 Step: 7 Item: outro Tasks: [Turn-In,Grenade - Ingredients (GrenadeCraftable),1]
qc2000000001_step7_outro.Text: Congratulations! You made a grenade. It's not pyrotechnics, but still pretty cool!

qc2000000001_step7_voice.SourceComment: Quest Chain: Stu's Got the Blues Id: 2000000001 Step: 7 Item: voice Tasks: [Turn-In,Grenade - Ingredients (GrenadeCraftable),1]
qc2000000001_step7_voice.Text: Make a Grenade in the Weapon Depot.

qc2000000001_step8.SourceComment: Quest Chain: STU'S GOT THE BLUES Id: 2000000001 Step: 8 Item:  Tasks: [Harvest,Coconut - Ingredients (Coconut),6],[Harvest,Swamp Gas - Ingredients (SwampGas),2]

qc2000000001_step8_intro.SourceComment: Quest Chain: STU'S GOT THE BLUES Id: 2000000001 Step: 8 Item: intro Tasks: [Harvest,Coconut - Ingredients (Coconut),6],[Harvest,Swamp Gas - Ingredients (SwampGas),2]
qc2000000001_step8_intro.Text: Phil, you made grenades: the Minion version of pyrotechnics. You'd better replenish your supply and make more. These are going to be very popular!

qc2000000001_step8_outro.SourceComment: Quest Chain: STU'S GOT THE BLUES Id: 2000000001 Step: 8 Item: outro Tasks: [Harvest,Coconut - Ingredients (Coconut),4],[Harvest,Swamp Gas - Ingredients (SwampGas),2]
qc2000000001_step8_outro.Text: Hey, you made pyrotechnics! Great job, Phil!

qc2000000001_step8_voice.SourceComment: Quest Chain: Stu's Got the Blues Id: 2000000001 Step: 8 Item: voice Tasks: [Turn-In,Fireworks - Dynamic_ingredients (OneOffFireworks),1]
qc2000000001_step8_voice.Text: Try to make Grenades again in the Weapon Depot.

qc2000000009_step1.SourceComment: Quest Chain: NATURE'S CALLING Id: 2000000009 Step: 1 Item:  Tasks: [Place,Bamboo Grove - Resource (ResourceBamboo),1]

qc2000000009_step1_description.SourceComment: Quest Chain: Nature's Call Id: 2000000009 Step: 1 Item: description Tasks: [Place,Bamboo Grove - Resource (ResourceBamboo),1]
qc2000000009_step1_description.Text: Phil builds a bathroom for the island.

qc2000000009_step1_intro.SourceComment: Quest Chain: NATURE'S CALLING Id: 2000000009 Step: 1 Item: intro Tasks: [Place,Bamboo Grove - Resource (ResourceBamboo),1]
qc2000000009_step1_intro.Text: Well, every island civilization reaches this point: the point where they need a bathroom. Time to think, Phil. Solutions don't grow on trees.

qc2000000009_step1_outro.SourceComment: Quest Chain: NATURE'S CALLING Id: 2000000009 Step: 1 Item: outro Tasks: [Place,Bamboo Grove - Resource (ResourceBamboo),1]
qc2000000009_step1_outro.Text: A bamboo farm! Great idea. Looks like solutions can grow on trees.

qc2000000009_step1_voice.SourceComment: Quest Chain: Phil the Builder Id: 2000000009 Step: 1 Item: voice Tasks: [Place,Bamboo Grove - Resource (ResourceBamboo),1]

qc2000000009_step2.SourceComment: Quest Chain: NATURE'S CALLING Id: 2000000009 Step: 2 Item:  Tasks: [Harvest,Bamboo - Ingredients (Bamboo),1],[Harvest,Coconut - Ingredients (Coconut),3],[Harvest,Gas Clouds - Ingredients (SwampGas),2]

qc2000000009_step2_intro.SourceComment: Quest Chain: NATURE'S CALLING Id: 2000000009 Step: 2 Item: intro Tasks: [Harvest,Bamboo - Ingredients (Bamboo),1],[Harvest,Coconut - Ingredients (Coconut),3],[Harvest,Gas Clouds - Ingredients (SwampGas),2]
qc2000000009_step2_intro.Text: Time to grab that bamboo! While you're at it, get your other resources too. We'll need a lot of them since we're building a Minions Paradise here, after all.

qc2000000009_step2_outro.SourceComment: Quest Chain: NATURE'S CALLING Id: 2000000009 Step: 2 Item: outro Tasks: [Harvest,Bamboo - Ingredients (Bamboo),1],[Harvest,Coconut - Ingredients (Coconut),3],[Harvest,Swamp Gas - Ingredients (SwampGas),3]
qc2000000009_step2_outro.Text: Great job on your first bamboo harvest!

qc2000000009_step2_voice.SourceComment: Quest Chain: Phil the Builder Id: 2000000009 Step: 2 Item: voice Tasks: [Harvest,Bamboo - Ingredients (Bamboo),3],[Harvest,Coconut - Ingredients (Coconut),3],[Harvest,Swamp Gas - Ingredients (SwampGas),3]

qc2000000009_step3.SourceComment: Quest Chain: NATURE'S CALLING Id: 2000000009 Step: 3 Item:  Tasks: [Place,Outhouse - Decoration (Toilet),1]

qc2000000009_step3_intro.SourceComment: Quest Chain: NATURE'S CALLING Id: 2000000009 Step: 3 Item: intro Tasks: [Place,Outhouse - Decoration (Toilet),1]
qc2000000009_step3_intro.Text: Alright, Phil! You have enough bamboo to build your Minion buddies the bathroom they need. Just in time too! Everyone's been holding it for a while.

qc2000000009_step3_outro.SourceComment: Quest Chain: NATURE'S CALLING Id: 2000000009 Step: 3 Item: outro Tasks: [Place,Outhouse - Decoration (Toilet),1]

qc2000000167_step1.SourceComment: Quest Chain: STU'S GOT THE BLUES Id: 2000000167 Step: 1 Item:  Tasks: [Mini-Game,Fishing Frenzy - Mignette (AlligatorSkiingMignette),1]

qc2000000167_step1_intro.SourceComment: Quest Chain: STU'S GOT THE BLUES Id: 2000000167 Step: 1 Item: intro Tasks: [Mini-Game,Fishing Frenzy - Mignette (AlligatorSkiingMignette),1]
qc2000000167_step1_intro.Text: If Stuart's level of irked is any indication, you'll need something fun and relaxing for all your buddies to do! Ask a buddy to scout out the island!

qc2000000167_step2.SourceComment: Quest Chain: STU'S GOT THE BLUES Id: 2000000167 Step: 2 Item:  Tasks: [Turn-In,Coconut - Ingredients (Coconut),3]

qc2000000167_step2_intro.SourceComment: Quest Chain: STU'S GOT THE BLUES Id: 2000000167 Step: 2 Item: intro Tasks: [Turn-In,Coconut - Ingredients (Coconut),3]
qc2000000167_step2_intro.Text: Phil, use these free Doubloons to have a third Minion buddy help grab those coconuts.

qc2000000167_step3.SourceComment: Quest Chain: STU'S GOT THE BLUES Id: 2000000167 Step: 3 Item:  Tasks: [Place,Gaseous Swamp - Resource (ResourceSwampGas),1]

qc2000000167_step3_intro.SourceComment: Quest Chain: STU'S GOT THE BLUES Id: 2000000167 Step: 3 Item: intro Tasks: [Place,Gaseous Swamp - Resource (ResourceSwampGas),1]
qc2000000167_step3_intro.Text: Stuart wants toasted coconut. And toasted coconut he shall have! All you have to do is figure out how to make toasted coconut on a desert island...

qc2000000167_step4.SourceComment: Quest Chain: STU'S GOT THE BLUES Id: 2000000167 Step: 4 Item:  Tasks: [Harvest,Gas Clouds - Ingredients (SwampGas),2]

qc2000000167_step4_intro.SourceComment: Quest Chain: STU'S GOT THE BLUES Id: 2000000167 Step: 4 Item: intro Tasks: [Harvest,Gas Clouds - Ingredients (SwampGas),2]
qc2000000167_step4_intro.Text: Swamp gas - what a weird, but brilliant, idea! Now just gather the ingredients you'll need for toasted coconut.

qc2000000167_step5.SourceComment: Quest Chain: STU'S GOT THE BLUES Id: 2000000167 Step: 5 Item:  Tasks: [Place,Weapons Armory - Crafting (CraftingWeapon),1],[Turn-In,Toasted Coconut - Dynamic_ingredients (ToastedCoconut),1]

qc2000000167_step5_intro.SourceComment: Quest Chain: STU'S GOT THE BLUES Id: 2000000167 Step: 5 Item: intro Tasks: [Place,Weapons Armory - Crafting (CraftingWeapon),1],[Turn-In,Toasted Coconut - Dynamic_ingredients (ToastedCoconut),1]
qc2000000167_step5_intro.Text: Now that we have everything we need, we are on an express train to Toasted Coconut City! Which is a metaphorical city full of toasted coconut!

qc2000000167_step6.SourceComment: Quest Chain: STU'S GOT THE BLUES Id: 2000000167 Step: 6 Item:  Tasks: [Harvest,Gas Clouds - Ingredients (SwampGas),1]

qc2000000167_step6_intro.SourceComment: Quest Chain: STU'S GOT THE BLUES Id: 2000000167 Step: 6 Item: intro Tasks: [Harvest,Gas Clouds - Ingredients (SwampGas),1]
qc2000000167_step6_intro.Text: Stuart would love for you to find a way to make him pyrotechnics for his shows. Nothing says "I love you, buddy!" like explosives.

qc2000000167_step7.SourceComment: Quest Chain: STU'S GOT THE BLUES Id: 2000000167 Step: 7 Item:  Tasks: [Harvest,Coconut - Ingredients (Coconut),3],[Harvest,Gas Clouds - Ingredients (SwampGas),1]

qc2000000167_step7_intro.SourceComment: Quest Chain: STU'S GOT THE BLUES Id: 2000000167 Step: 7 Item: intro Tasks: [Harvest,Coconut - Ingredients (Coconut),3],[Harvest,Gas Clouds - Ingredients (SwampGas),1]
qc2000000167_step7_intro.Text: You don't exactly know how to make pyrotechnics, but I bet you can figure it out through trial and error! Hopefully not too much error.

qc2000000167_step8.SourceComment: Quest Chain: STU'S GOT THE BLUES Id: 2000000167 Step: 8 Item:  Tasks: [Turn-In,Grenade - Ingredients (GrenadeCraftable),1]

qc2000000167_step8_intro.SourceComment: Quest Chain: STU'S GOT THE BLUES Id: 2000000167 Step: 8 Item: intro Tasks: [Turn-In,Grenade - Ingredients (GrenadeCraftable),1]
qc2000000167_step8_intro.Text: Mix the coconuts and swamp gas together in the Weapons Depot! That is a sentence nobody has ever said before!

qc2000000167_step9.SourceComment: Quest Chain: STU'S GOT THE BLUES Id: 2000000167 Step: 9 Item:  Tasks: [Harvest,Coconut - Ingredients (Coconut),3],[Harvest,Gas Clouds - Ingredients (SwampGas),3]

qc2000000167_step9_intro.SourceComment: Quest Chain: STU'S GOT THE BLUES Id: 2000000167 Step: 9 Item: intro Tasks: [Harvest,Coconut - Ingredients (Coconut),3],[Harvest,Gas Clouds - Ingredients (SwampGas),3]
qc2000000167_step9_intro.Text: Phil, you made grenades: the Minion version of pyrotechnics. You'd better replenish your supply and make more. These are going to be very popular!

qc2000001060_step1_intro.Text: You need some sharp objects on this island! It's hard to get up to the level of mischief Minions are accustomed to with explosives alone.

qc2000001060_step2.SourceComment: Quest Chain: A THROWING STAR IS BORN Id: 2000001060 Step: 2 Item:  Tasks: [Place,Minion Sign - Decoration (MinionSign),1]

qc2000001060_step2_intro.SourceComment: Quest Chain: A THROWING STAR IS BORN Id: 2000001060 Step: 2 Item: intro Tasks: [Place,Minion Sign - Decoration (MinionSign),1]
qc2000001060_step2_intro.Text: You know what else would look "sharp" on this island... a giant Minions Sign! Anything worth doing is worth overdoing.

qc2000001060_step3.SourceComment: Quest Chain: A THROWING STAR IS BORN Id: 2000001060 Step: 3 Item:  Tasks: [Harvest,Razor Clam - Ingredients (RazorClam),2],[Harvest,Coconut - Ingredients (Coconut),4],[Harvest,Bamboo - Ingredients (Bamboo),4]

qc2000001060_step3_intro.SourceComment: Quest Chain: A THROWING STAR IS BORN Id: 2000001060 Step: 3 Item: intro Tasks: [Harvest,Razor Clam - Ingredients (RazorClam),2],[Harvest,Coconut - Ingredients (Coconut),4],[Harvest,Bamboo - Ingredients (Bamboo),4]
qc2000001060_step3_intro.Text: Playing with sharp objects is incredibly dangerous... and for Minions, incredibly fun! Grab some Razor Clams to make some throwing stars. Collect some Coconuts and Bamboo as you'll need some targets.

qc2000001060_step4.SourceComment: Quest Chain: A THROWING STAR IS BORN Id: 2000001060 Step: 4 Item:  Tasks: [Harvest,Throwing Star - Ingredients (ThrowingStarsCraftable),1]

qc2000001060_step4_intro.SourceComment: Quest Chain: A THROWING STAR IS BORN Id: 2000001060 Step: 4 Item: intro Tasks: [Harvest,Throwing Star - Ingredients (ThrowingStarsCraftable),1]
qc2000001060_step4_intro.Text: Making a Throwing Star can be pretty tricky. Take one Razor Clam, add a Razor Clam, add another Razor Clam, and... okay, it's not that tricky.

qc2000001060_step5.SourceComment: Quest Chain: A THROWING STAR IS BORN Id: 2000001060 Step: 5 Item:  Tasks: [Order Board,Ticket,3]

qc2000001060_step5_intro.SourceComment: Quest Chain: A THROWING STAR IS BORN Id: 2000001060 Step: 5 Item: intro Tasks: [Order Board,Ticket,3]
qc2000001060_step5_intro.Text: Flinging around super-sharp Throwing Stars may be fun... but it doesn't earn you Party Points. For that, you better head back to the Celebration Station!

qc2000001060_step6.SourceComment: Quest Chain: A THROWING STAR IS BORN Id: 2000001060 Step: 6 Item:  Tasks: [Harvest,Throwing Star - Ingredients (ThrowingStarsCraftable),1],[Harvest,Razor Clam - Ingredients (RazorClam),2]

qc2000001060_step6_intro.SourceComment: Quest Chain: A THROWING STAR IS BORN Id: 2000001060 Step: 6 Item: intro Tasks: [Harvest,Throwing Star - Ingredients (ThrowingStarsCraftable),1],[Harvest,Razor Clam - Ingredients (RazorClam),2]
qc2000001060_step6_intro.Text: Phil, your Throwing Stars have turned every Minion on this island into an amateur ninja. And they love it! Looks like you're gonna need more Razor Clams.

qc2000001070_step1.SourceComment: Quest Chain: THE BIG BLOWOUT Id: 2000001070 Step: 1 Item:  Tasks: [Place,Gaseous Swamp - Resource (ResourceSwampGas),1]

qc2000001070_step1_intro.SourceComment: Quest Chain: THE BIG BLOWOUT Id: 2000001070 Step: 1 Item: intro Tasks: [Place,Gaseous Swamp - Resource (ResourceSwampGas),1]
qc2000001070_step1_intro.Text: Now that more Minions are joining the party, you'll need more ways to make sure everyone is having a blast!

qc2000001070_step2.SourceComment: Quest Chain: THE BIG BLOWOUT Id: 2000001070 Step: 2 Item:  Tasks: [Harvest,Gas Clouds - Ingredients (SwampGas),2]

qc2000001070_step2_intro.SourceComment: Quest Chain: THE BIG BLOWOUT Id: 2000001070 Step: 2 Item: intro Tasks: [Harvest,Gas Clouds - Ingredients (SwampGas),2]
qc2000001070_step2_intro.Text: Swamp Gas? This island is just full of surprises. Some of them smell better than others. Collect some of that Swamp Gas and see what it can do.

qc2000001070_step3.SourceComment: Quest Chain: THE BIG BLOWOUT Id: 2000001070 Step: 3 Item:  Tasks: [Place,Weapons Armory - Crafting (CraftingWeapon),1]

qc2000001070_step3_intro.SourceComment: Quest Chain: THE BIG BLOWOUT Id: 2000001070 Step: 3 Item: intro Tasks: [Place,Weapons Armory - Crafting (CraftingWeapon),1]
qc2000001070_step3_intro.Text: Focus, Phil! Playing in Swamp Gas is fun, but you've got to find a way to put more POW in your parties.

qc2000001070_step4.SourceComment: Quest Chain: THE BIG BLOWOUT Id: 2000001070 Step: 4 Item:  Tasks: [Harvest,Gas Clouds - Ingredients (SwampGas),1]

qc2000001070_step4_intro.SourceComment: Quest Chain: THE BIG BLOWOUT Id: 2000001070 Step: 4 Item: intro Tasks: [Harvest,Gas Clouds - Ingredients (SwampGas),1]
qc2000001070_step4_intro.Text: A Weapons Armory! That'll make sure your buddies have an explosive time on this island. Better collect some more Swamp Gas first.

qc2000001070_step5.SourceComment: Quest Chain: THE BIG BLOWOUT Id: 2000001070 Step: 5 Item:  Tasks: [Harvest,Coconut - Ingredients (Coconut),3],[Harvest,Gas Clouds - Ingredients (SwampGas),1]

qc2000001070_step5_intro.SourceComment: Quest Chain: THE BIG BLOWOUT Id: 2000001070 Step: 5 Item: intro Tasks: [Harvest,Coconut - Ingredients (Coconut),3],[Harvest,Gas Clouds - Ingredients (SwampGas),1]
qc2000001070_step5_intro.Text: See what your new Weapons Armory can do! Grab some more Swamp Gas and Coconuts to give it a try. What's the worst that could happen?

qc2000001070_step6.SourceComment: Quest Chain: THE BIG BLOWOUT Id: 2000001070 Step: 6 Item:  Tasks: [Harvest,Grenade - Ingredients (GrenadeCraftable),1]

qc2000001070_step6_intro.SourceComment: Quest Chain: THE BIG BLOWOUT Id: 2000001070 Step: 6 Item: intro Tasks: [Harvest,Grenade - Ingredients (GrenadeCraftable),1]
qc2000001070_step6_intro.Text: What do you get when you combine Coconuts and Swamp Gas in the Weapons Armory? Hopefully something better than a stinky bra.

qc2000001070_step7.SourceComment: Quest Chain: THE BIG BLOWOUT Id: 2000001070 Step: 7 Item:  Tasks: [Turn-In,Grenade - Ingredients (GrenadeCraftable),1]

qc2000001070_step7_intro.SourceComment: Quest Chain: THE BIG BLOWOUT Id: 2000001070 Step: 7 Item: intro Tasks: [Turn-In,Grenade - Ingredients (GrenadeCraftable),1]
qc2000001070_step7_intro.Text: Whoa! You made Grenades! Way to take "having a blast" literally, Phil. These are going to be incredibly popular. Better get supplies to make more!

qc2000001077_step1_intro.Text: Paper is a part of any sophisticated society. If you want this paradise to be more sophisticated, you can start wearing a monocle... Or figure out a way to start collecting paper.

qc2000001083_step1_intro.Text: Your buddies are having a blast on the beach... but what about up in the sky? Take the fun to new heights with a spectacular air show!

qc2000001083_step2_intro.SourceComment: Quest Chain: UP IN THE AIR Id: 2000001083 Step: 2 Item: intro Tasks: [Turn-In,Paper Airplane - Ingredients (PaperAirplaneCraftable),6]
qc2000001083_step2_intro.Text: Get your friends into the airshow spirit by making your friends some paper airplanes! Get folding, Phil!

qc2000001083_step3_intro.Text: You gained valuable aeronautical experience making paper airplanes. Time to take this air show up a notch - by making some kites and hang gliders!

qc2000001083_step4.SourceComment: Quest Chain: UP IN THE AIR Id: 2000001083 Step: 4 Item:  Tasks: [Turn-In,Jet Pack - Ingredients (JetPackCraftable),6]

qc2000001083_step4_intro.Text: Your air show has everything a Minion could ever want... except extreme physical danger! But you can change that. All you need are jet packs!

qc2000001090_step1.SourceComment: Quest Chain: NO SNOW, NO PROBLEM Id: 2000001090 Step: 1 Item:  Tasks: [Place,Tropical Snowman - Decoration (DecorWinterStandard01),1]

qc2000001090_step1_intro.SourceComment: Quest Chain: NO SNOW, NO PROBLEM Id: 2000001090 Step: 1 Item: intro Tasks: [Place,Tropical Snowman - Decoration (DecorWinterStandard01),1]
qc2000001090_step1_intro.Text: The Holiday Minion is here! He's super excited to spend the winter season with you. Your paradise may be hot and sunny, but he'll show you how to make it fun and festive! Nothing says holiday cheer like a snowman, so Holiday Minion wants you to build one! Since there isn't any snow, you'll have to be creative.

qc2000001090_step2.SourceComment: Quest Chain: NO SNOW, NO PROBLEM Id: 2000001090 Step: 2 Item:  Tasks: [Harvest,Bamboo - Ingredients (Bamboo),2]

qc2000001090_step2_intro.SourceComment: Quest Chain: NO SNOW, NO PROBLEM Id: 2000001090 Step: 2 Item: intro Tasks: [Harvest,Bamboo - Ingredients (Bamboo),2]
qc2000001090_step2_intro.Text: Great job, Phil! The best part is that it will never melt. Holiday Minion has lots more ideas for festive decorations, but first you'll need some Bamboo.

qc2000001090_step3.SourceComment: Quest Chain: NO SNOW, NO PROBLEM Id: 2000001090 Step: 3 Item:  Tasks: [Harvest,Skateboard - Ingredients (SkateboardCraftable),1],[Place,Icy Half Pipe - Leisure (LeisureSnowboardRamp),1],[Leisure,Icy Half Pipe - Leisure (LeisureSnowboardRamp),2]

qc2000001090_step3_intro.SourceComment: Quest Chain: NO SNOW, NO PROBLEM Id: 2000001090 Step: 3 Item: intro Tasks: [Harvest,Skateboard - Ingredients (SkateboardCraftable),1],[Place,Icy Half Pipe - Leisure (LeisureSnowboardRamp),1],[Leisure,Icy Half Pipe - Leisure (LeisureSnowboardRamp),2]
qc2000001090_step3_intro.Text: Holiday Minion wants to make sure your buddies keep cool this holiday on their very own epic snowboard ramp! Help him build it.

qc2000001090_step4.SourceComment: Quest Chain: NO SNOW, NO PROBLEM Id: 2000001090 Step: 4 Item:  Tasks: [Mini-Game,Fishing Frenzy - Mignette (AlligatorSkiingMignette),1]

qc2000001090_step4_intro.SourceComment: Quest Chain: NO SNOW, NO PROBLEM Id: 2000001090 Step: 4 Item: intro Tasks: [Mini-Game,Fishing Frenzy - Mignette (AlligatorSkiingMignette),1]
qc2000001090_step4_intro.Text: Some people celebrate the holidays by eating a ham. But why eat a ham... when you can feed it to a hungry gator? Go enjoy a round of Fishing Frenzy!

qc2000001090_step5.SourceComment: Quest Chain: NO SNOW, NO PROBLEM Id: 2000001090 Step: 5 Item:  Tasks: [Harvest,Bamboo - Ingredients (Bamboo),4],[Leisure,Icy Half Pipe - Leisure (LeisureSnowboardRamp),1]

qc2000001090_step5_intro.SourceComment: Quest Chain: NO SNOW, NO PROBLEM Id: 2000001090 Step: 5 Item: intro Tasks: [Harvest,Bamboo - Ingredients (Bamboo),4],[Leisure,Icy Half Pipe - Leisure (LeisureSnowboardRamp),1]
qc2000001090_step5_intro.Text: Your snowboard ramp isn't just spreading cheer. It's also earning you Party Points! Go collect them - along with more Bamboo for your next decoration.

qc2000001090_step6.SourceComment: Quest Chain: NO SNOW, NO PROBLEM Id: 2000001090 Step: 6 Item:  Tasks: [Order Board,Ticket,3]

qc2000001090_step6_intro.SourceComment: Quest Chain: NO SNOW, NO PROBLEM Id: 2000001090 Step: 6 Item: intro Tasks: [Order Board,Ticket,3]
qc2000001090_step6_intro.Text: Putting up holiday decorations isn't the only way to spread cheer. You can also throw parties! Prepare for the next one at the Celebration Station.

qc2000001096_step1.SourceComment: Quest Chain: O PALM TREE Id: 2000001096 Step: 1 Item:  Tasks: [Place,Holiday Palm - Decoration (DecorWinterPremium02),1]

qc2000001096_step1_intro.SourceComment: Quest Chain: O PALM TREE Id: 2000001096 Step: 1 Item: intro Tasks: [Place,Holiday Palm - Decoration (DecorWinterPremium02),1]
qc2000001096_step1_intro.Text: Your buddies want a holiday tree! You can swim thousands of miles to a cold-weather climate where evergreens grow... or just use a Palm Tree.

qc2000001096_step2_intro.Text: Now that they have a tree, your buddies can't wait to open their presents. Speed up the unwrapping process with some Razor Clams and Throwing Stars!

qc2000001096_step3.SourceComment: Quest Chain: O PALM TREE Id: 2000001096 Step: 3 Item:  Tasks: [Harvest,Ice - Ingredients (Ice),3],[Turn-In,Ice Sculpture - Ingredients (IceSculptureCraftable),2]

qc2000001096_step3_intro.SourceComment: Quest Chain: O PALM TREE Id: 2000001096 Step: 3 Item: intro Tasks: [Harvest,Ice - Ingredients (Ice),3],[Turn-In,Ice Sculpture - Ingredients (IceSculptureCraftable),2]
qc2000001096_step3_intro.Text: You may not be able to make a snowman out of actual snow... but you can make a Minion out of Ice! Collect some, then carve it into an Ice Sculpture.

qc2000001096_step4.SourceComment: Quest Chain: O PALM TREE Id: 2000001096 Step: 4 Item:  Tasks: [Mini-Game,Fishing Frenzy - Mignette (AlligatorSkiingMignette),2]

qc2000001096_step4_intro.SourceComment: Quest Chain: O PALM TREE Id: 2000001096 Step: 4 Item: intro Tasks: [Mini-Game,Fishing Frenzy - Mignette (AlligatorSkiingMignette),2]
qc2000001096_step4_intro.Text: The best thing about holidays in the tropics is that it's still warm enough to go fishing... or alligator waterskiing! Go enjoy some Fishing Frenzy!

qc2000001096_step5.SourceComment: Quest Chain: O PALM TREE Id: 2000001096 Step: 5 Item:  Tasks: [Place,Candy Cane Patch - Decoration (DecorWinterStandard03),1],[Place,Candy Cane Lane - Decoration (DecorWinterStandard04),1]

qc2000001096_step5_intro.Text: Spread more cheer by decorating the island with some colorful candy canes. You can turn your holiday wonderland into a holiday candy land!

qc2000001096_step6.SourceComment: Quest Chain: O PALM TREE Id: 2000001096 Step: 6 Item:  Tasks: [Order Board,Ticket,4]

qc2000001096_step6_intro.SourceComment: Quest Chain: O PALM TREE Id: 2000001096 Step: 6 Item: intro Tasks: [Order Board,Ticket,4]
qc2000001096_step6_intro.Text: Head over to the Celebration Station to complete any outstanding party supplies. Then head over to the snowboard ramp to see some outstanding tricks!

qc2000001102_step1_intro.Text: Holiday Minion needs help with some DIY decorations. Since no one needs socks at the beach, he wants to hang them... with care!

qc2000001102_step2_intro.Text: It's not the holidays without over-eating! Help Holiday Minion make some sweet treats for the Minions to gorge on.

qc2000001102_step3_intro.Text: Your Minion buddies want to make Snow Angels! There's no snow, but Holiday Minion has a trick up his holiday sweater sleeve...

qc2000001102_step4_intro.SourceComment: Quest Chain: SANDY WONDERLAND Id: 2000001102 Step: 4 Item: intro Tasks: [Harvest,Spider Web - Ingredients (SpiderWeb),2]
qc2000001102_step4_intro.Text: 'Tis the season of giving, and your Minion buddies could use some new fishing gear! Collect Spider Webs to make them the gift that keeps on fishing!

qc2000001102_step5_intro.Text: Finding the perfect holiday gift can be tough... but there's plenty of junk in the sea! All you need is a good Fishing Rod to snag it.

qc2000001102_step6.SourceComment: Quest Chain: SANDY WONDERLAND Id: 2000001102 Step: 6 Item:  Tasks: [Turn-In,Fishing Net - Ingredients (FishingNetCraftable),2],[Leisure,Sand Angels - Leisure (LeisureSandAngel),2]

qc2000001108_step1_intro.Text: The Minions sculpted a lovely, sand holiday tree! The best part about a sand tree is that the presents under it are like buried treasure!

qc2000001108_step6_intro.Text: The weather outside is far from frightful, but it could still be a little cooler. Holiday Minion suggests you make a couple things to cool off with!

qc2000001114_step1_intro.SourceComment: Quest Chain: THE PERFECT GIFT Id: 2000001114 Step: 1 Item: intro Tasks: [Place,Snow Cone O Matic - Leisure (LeisureSnowConeMachine),1],[Leisure,Snow Cone O Matic - Leisure (LeisureSnowConeMachine),1]
qc2000001114_step1_intro.Text: Snow is in short supply in the tropics, but that doesn't mean Snowcones have to be!

qc2000001114_step2.SourceComment: Quest Chain: THE PERFECT GIFT Id: 2000001114 Step: 2 Item:  Tasks: [Turn-In,Bobsled - Ingredients (BobsledCraftable),3],[Turn-In,Pepper Spray Bazooka - Ingredients (PepperSprayBazookaCraftable),3]

qc2000001114_step2_intro.SourceComment: Quest Chain: THE PERFECT GIFT Id: 2000001114 Step: 2 Item: intro Tasks: [Turn-In,Bobsled - Ingredients (BobsledCraftable),3],[Turn-In,Pepper Spray Bazooka - Ingredients (PepperSprayBazookaCraftable),3]
qc2000001114_step2_intro.Text: What do you get a Minion who has everything? A Bob Sled and a Pepper Spray Bazooka, of course!

qc2000001114_step3.SourceComment: Quest Chain: THE PERFECT GIFT Id: 2000001114 Step: 3 Item:  Tasks: [Place,Stocking Palm - Decoration (DecorWinterStandard10),1],[Place,Lighted Palms - Decoration (DecorWinterStandard11),1]

qc2000001114_step3_intro.SourceComment: Quest Chain: THE PERFECT GIFT Id: 2000001114 Step: 3 Item: intro Tasks: [Place,Stocking Palm - Decoration (DecorWinterStandard10),1],[Place,Lighted Palms - Decoration (DecorWinterStandard11),1]
qc2000001114_step3_intro.Text: The best part about decorating your own private paradise is that no one can tell you when to take your holiday decorations down. Remote island means no pesky neighbors!

qc2000001114_step4.SourceComment: Quest Chain: THE PERFECT GIFT Id: 2000001114 Step: 4 Item:  Tasks: [Turn-In,Firefly - Ingredients (Fireflies),1],[Turn-In,Fireworks - Ingredients (FireworksCraftable),2]

qc2000001114_step4_intro.SourceComment: Quest Chain: THE PERFECT GIFT Id: 2000001114 Step: 4 Item: intro Tasks: [Turn-In,Firefly - Ingredients (Fireflies),1],[Turn-In,Fireworks - Ingredients (FireworksCraftable),2]
qc2000001114_step4_intro.Text: Help Holiday Minion gather Fireflies and Fireworks to use as holiday lights. Holiday Minion is energetic as well as energy conscious!

qc2000001114_step5.SourceComment: Quest Chain: THE PERFECT GIFT Id: 2000001114 Step: 5 Item:  Tasks: [Turn-In,Torch - Ingredients (TorchCraftable),2],[Turn-In,Headlamp - Ingredients (HeadlampCraftable),2]

qc2000001114_step5_intro.Text: Many holiday celebrations are light-themed - and Holiday Minion wants yours to shine brightly! Help him out by making Torches and Headlamps.

qc2000001114_step6.SourceComment: Quest Chain: THE PERFECT GIFT Id: 2000001114 Step: 6 Item:  Tasks: [Turn-In,Fruitcake Launcher - Dynamic_ingredients (WinterOneOffPlaceholder),1],[Leisure,Snow Cone O Matic - Leisure (LeisureSnowConeMachine),1],[Leisure,Sand Angels - Leisure (LeisureSandAngel),1]

qc2000001114_step6_intro.SourceComment: Quest Chain: THE PERFECT GIFT Id: 2000001114 Step: 6 Item: intro Tasks: [Turn-In,Fruitcake Launcher - Dynamic_ingredients (WinterOneOffPlaceholder),1],[Leisure,Snow Cone O Matic - Leisure (LeisureSnowConeMachine),1],[Leisure,Sand Angels - Leisure (LeisureSandAngel),1]
qc2000001114_step6_intro.Text: It's better to give than to receive... especially when the gift is fruitcake! Give it to somebody far, far away by constructing a Fruitcake Launcher!

qc2000001120_step1.SourceComment: Quest Chain: STICKY SITUATION Id: 2000001120 Step: 1 Item:  Tasks: [Place,Honeybee Hive - Resource (ResourceHoneyBeeHive),1],[Harvest,Honey - Ingredients (Honey),3]

qc2000001120_step1_intro.SourceComment: Quest Chain: STICKY SITUATION Id: 2000001120 Step: 1 Item: intro Tasks: [Place,Honeybee Hive - Resource (ResourceHoneyBeeHive),1],[Harvest,Honey - Ingredients (Honey),3]
qc2000001120_step1_intro.Text: Bob is craving sugary snacks. Place a Honey Hive so you can harvest honey and make Bob's favorite treats.

qc2000001120_step2.SourceComment: Quest Chain: STICKY SITUATION Id: 2000001120 Step: 2 Item:  Tasks: [Turn-In,Honey Comb - Ingredients (HoneycombCraftable),12],[Turn-In,Chewing Gum - Ingredients (ChewingGumCraftable),12]

qc2000001120_step2_intro.SourceComment: Quest Chain: STICKY SITUATION Id: 2000001120 Step: 2 Item: intro Tasks: [Turn-In,Honey Comb - Ingredients (HoneycombCraftable),12],[Turn-In,Chewing Gum - Ingredients (ChewingGumCraftable),12]
qc2000001120_step2_intro.Text: Bob worked up an appetite harvesting honey! Make him some honeycomb to snack on. Then, make him some chewing gum, because no one likes honeycomb breath.

qc2000001122_step1.SourceComment: Quest Chain: CHEF PHIL Id: 2000001122 Step: 1 Item:  Tasks: [Harvest,Chili Oil - Ingredients (ChiliOilCraftable),6],[Turn-In,Spicy Curry - Ingredients (SpicyCurryCraftable),12]

qc2000001122_step1_intro.SourceComment: Quest Chain: CHEF PHIL Id: 2000001122 Step: 1 Item: intro Tasks: [Harvest,Chili Oil - Ingredients (ChiliOilCraftable),6],[Turn-In,Spicy Curry - Ingredients (SpicyCurryCraftable),12]
qc2000001122_step1_intro.Text: Ever since you planted those chili peppers, your buddies have been craving something spicy. What are you waiting for? Grab some chilis and start cooking!

qc2000001122_step2.SourceComment: Quest Chain: CHEF PHIL Id: 2000001122 Step: 2 Item:  Tasks: [Turn-In,Ice Cream - Ingredients (IceCreamCraftable),12]

qc2000001122_step2_intro.SourceComment: Quest Chain: CHEF PHIL Id: 2000001122 Step: 2 Item: intro Tasks: [Turn-In,Ice Cream - Ingredients (IceCreamCraftable),12]
qc2000001122_step2_intro.Text: Great job on that curry, Phil... is what your buddies would be saying if their mouths weren't on fire! Quick! Cool their tastebuds off with some ice cream!

qc2000001122_step3.SourceComment: Quest Chain: CHEF PHIL Id: 2000001122 Step: 3 Item:  Tasks: [Harvest,Piranha - Ingredients (Piranha),6],[Turn-In,Sushi - Ingredients (SushiCraftable),12]

qc2000001122_step3_intro.SourceComment: Quest Chain: CHEF PHIL Id: 2000001122 Step: 3 Item: intro Tasks: [Harvest,Piranha - Ingredients (Piranha),6],[Turn-In,Sushi - Ingredients (SushiCraftable),12]
qc2000001122_step3_intro.Text: Uh-oh, Phil. That ice cream has given your buddies brain freeze! Try making something that isn't too hot or too cold... like sushi!

qc2000001122_step4.SourceComment: Quest Chain: CHEF PHIL Id: 2000001122 Step: 4 Item:  Tasks: [Turn-In,Frozen Banana - Ingredients (FrozenBananaCraftable),12]

qc2000001122_step4_intro.SourceComment: Quest Chain: CHEF PHIL Id: 2000001122 Step: 4 Item: intro Tasks: [Turn-In,Frozen Banana - Ingredients (FrozenBananaCraftable),12]
qc2000001122_step4_intro.Text: Your buddies loved that sushi, Phil. But now they're ready for dessert! How about some frozen bananas?

qc2000001122_step5.SourceComment: Quest Chain: CHEF PHIL Id: 2000001122 Step: 5 Item:  Tasks: [Turn-In,Spicy Detox Drink - Ingredients (SpicyDetoxDrinkCraftable),15]

qc2000001122_step5_intro.SourceComment: Quest Chain: CHEF PHIL Id: 2000001122 Step: 5 Item: intro Tasks: [Turn-In,Spicy Detox Drink - Ingredients (SpicyDetoxDrinkCraftable),15]
qc2000001122_step5_intro.Text: The good news: your buddies aren't hungry anymore. The bad news: they ate too many frozen bananas! Make them feel better with a spicy detox drink.

qc2000001127_step1.SourceComment: Quest Chain: DRONE QUEST Id: 2000001127 Step: 1 Item:  Tasks: [Harvest,Ice - Ingredients (Ice),6]

qc2000001127_step1_intro.SourceComment: Quest Chain: DRONE QUEST Id: 2000001127 Step: 1 Item: intro Tasks: [Harvest,Ice - Ingredients (Ice),6]
qc2000001127_step1_intro.Text: There's nothing Minions love more than catching a wave - unless it's a heat wave! Quick, harvest some ice for your buddies before they overheat.

qc2000001127_step2.SourceComment: Quest Chain: DRONE QUEST Id: 2000001127 Step: 2 Item:  Tasks: [Place,High Tech Hover Hut - Crafting (CraftingTech),1]

qc2000001127_step2_intro.SourceComment: Quest Chain: DRONE QUEST Id: 2000001127 Step: 2 Item: intro Tasks: [Place,High Tech Hover Hut - Crafting (CraftingTech),1]
qc2000001127_step2_intro.Text: Great job on that ice! There's just one problem: by the time you deliver it to your buddies, it'll be melted! You're gonna need a high tech solution.

qc2000001127_step3.SourceComment: Quest Chain: DRONE QUEST Id: 2000001127 Step: 3 Item:  Tasks: [Harvest,Battery - Ingredients (Battery),3]

qc2000001127_step3_intro.SourceComment: Quest Chain: DRONE QUEST Id: 2000001127 Step: 3 Item: intro Tasks: [Harvest,Battery - Ingredients (Battery),3]
qc2000001127_step3_intro.Text: You need two things to invent a high tech device: a great idea, and batteries. Since you don't have any ideas yet, maybe start with the batteries.

qc2000001127_step4.SourceComment: Quest Chain: DRONE QUEST Id: 2000001127 Step: 4 Item:  Tasks: [Harvest,Hang Glider - Ingredients (HangGliderCraftable),3]

qc2000001127_step4_intro.SourceComment: Quest Chain: DRONE QUEST Id: 2000001127 Step: 4 Item: intro Tasks: [Harvest,Hang Glider - Ingredients (HangGliderCraftable),3]
qc2000001127_step4_intro.Text: Now that you have batteries, you'll need that delivery idea. They say the best inventors have their heads in the clouds, so why don't you build yourself a hang glider to help shake an idea loose?

qc2000001127_step5.SourceComment: Quest Chain: DRONE QUEST Id: 2000001127 Step: 5 Item:  Tasks: [Turn-In,Drone - Ingredients (DroneCraftable),12],[Turn-In,Banana Split - Ingredients (BananaSplitCraftable),12]

qc2000001127_step5_intro.SourceComment: Quest Chain: DRONE QUEST Id: 2000001127 Step: 5 Item: intro Tasks: [Turn-In,Drone - Ingredients (DroneCraftable),12],[Turn-In,Banana Split - Ingredients (BananaSplitCraftable),12]
qc2000001127_step5_intro.Text: Phil, you're a genius! Adding batteries to a hang glider turns it into a drone... which can deliver ice to all your buddies! Not to mention banana splits!

qc333214_pre.Text: You're going to need more coconuts.  Your buddies were having so much fun harvesting them, so keep them happy and distracted getting coconuts until you build them more cool stuff!

questDialogKey1.Text: Welcome to Henchman Week on Villain Network Channel, the only channel by Villains, for Villains. I'm Rat Finkel. Today's episode is all about everyone's favorite little yellow screw-ups, the MINIONS.

questDialogKey10.Text: Wow! Look at those Minions! Fun fact: the official term for a group of Minions is "group."

questDialogKey11.Text: Your Minions look weary after all that tapping. They could use some relaxation...

questDialogKey12.Text: Whoever invented Inner Tubes is a genius. Or they just really wanted a giant donut. Now I want a giant donut.

questDialogKey13.Text: The Minions reeeaally want to use the inner tube. But like everything, they won't do it until you tell them to. Take pity on them! Tap a Minion, then tap the Inner Tube.

questDialogKey14.Text: Ahh. Now the Minions are ready for anything. Especially more inner tubing! No? It was worth a shot.

questDialogKey15.Text: That's more stuff than back when they had no stuff, so they should probably have a storage building. Building the Storage Building! You can find it in the Other Stuff tab in the shop.

questDialogKey16.Text: You can see any stuff you get by tapping this building. Way better than the original plan of jettisoning everything into space.

questDialogKey17.Text: There is a new "it" Villain in town... Professor Flux! He's been seeking a new power source for his time machine ever since the electric company cut him off for not paying his bills (turns out it's hard to get work when you're a self-proclaimed Mad Scientist). Let's help him out by building him a Battery Center from the Make Stuff tab in the shop.

questDialogKey18.Text: Word on the street is that Professor Flux will be pleased. The other word on the street is that there are also no streets in this game, so we're not entirely sure where that information came from.

questDialogKey19.Text: Just the giant face I was hoping to see. My name is Professor Flux. I promise you that I won't pop up out of nowhere like this in the final game. On the other hand, I am an evil mad scientist so I can do whatever I want! Now, get those Minions to make me a battery! Tap a Minion, then tap the Battery Center. Tap to collect the Battery when it is ready!

questDialogKey2.Text: As we all know, the Minions have existed since the dawn of TIME - starting out as itty-bitty yellow, single-celled organisms and evolving through the ages to serve big bad criminals. But what did their lives look like before they met their current BFF, Gru?

questDialogKey20.Text: You're like a million times cooler than your friend who knits stuff. And exactly as cool as your friend who makes batteries.

questDialogKey21.Text: In case you haven't deduced it yet, I'm building the world's most powerful Potassium Ion Battery! I know what you're thinking: I'm in awe of myself too. All I need is a rich source of potassium: Bananas! Build me a Banana Farm from the Make Stuff tab in the shop!

questDialogKey22.Text: Ah yes. My plan is coming to...FRUITION! Get it? Because a banana is a fruit, and I said FRUITion. No? Oh come on, that was great.

questDialogKey23.Text: Or, let me rephrase that. You and the Minions can harvest 2 bananas while I hang out off-screen and play Bejeweled. Tap 2 Minions and then tap the Banana Farm. Tap the Bananas to collect them when they are ready!

questDialogKey24.Text: I made it past level 112 in Bejeweled! Good job to you too for that thing you just did.

questDialogKey25.Text: Now all we need to do is combine our items to create a potassium ion battery. Minions, you wait here while I fetch my electrolytic combinator from the lab.

questDialogKey26.Text: The Minions have decided to help Professor Flux out while he is away by taking matters into their own hands. Who needs an electro-whatever combinamajig to mix a battery and a banana together? Just use a blender! Build a smoothie shop from the Mix Stuff tab in the shop.

questDialogKey27.Text: Let's start blending these bananas and batteries together before Professor Flux gets back and ruins the surprise.  He deserves something nice, with how hard he works and how bald he is. Blend the ingredients in the Smoothie Shop! Tap the Smoothie Shop, then drag the recipe into production.

questDialogKey28.Text: Great job blending the Batteries and Bananas. Whoa, you made an Energy Shake! And it has such a healthy, mercury-riddled glow.

questDialogKey29.Text: Drag the Time Machine out of the Other Stuff tab in the Shop and place it on the grass. Looks like Flux built it out of an old cardio machine. How ecologically friendly. Or maybe he just robbed a spin class.

questDialogKey3.Text: Today we'll cover a little known time in the Minions' history: the lost years! We'll tell you how they started a Villain paradise where they helped some of the world's baddest characters do their dastardly deeds. It all started when they got their hands on some cheap swampland in Florida...

questDialogKey30.Text: Thanks for helping the Minions move that. Must have been hard work for your finger.

questDialogKey31.Text: Don't you dare touch my time machine! That means YOU!

questDialogKey32.Text: The Minions think they can power that thing themselves if they drink the Energy Shake! Have a Minion jump on the bike and ride! Tap a Minion, then tap on the Time Machine.

questDialogKey33.Text: Looks like Flux isn't coming back anytime soon, but on the upside, at least you get to keep all the cool stuff you built.

questDialogKey34.Text: Building a Want Ads Board from the Other Stuff tab will let us start selling items to Villains around the world. The Villains will pay us money. We can use the money to buy stuff like-- actually, you know how money works. We'll stop talking.

questDialogKey35.Text: This Want Ads Board lets Villains from anywhere post what they need. Just don't judge them and their dastardly ways. This is a safe zone for evildoers. Tap on the Want Ads Board and fulfill an order now!

questDialogKey36.Text: It's profitable, and it helps Villains, so it's for a good cause! Kind of.

questDialogKey37.Text: You've completed the tutorial. The Minions ate all of our gold stars, but we hope you still feel rewarded. Keep exploring the world of the Minions!

questDialogKey38.Text: This is a automatic quest test. Ignore this if it doesn't concern you.

questDialogKey39.Text: To trigger the quest chain: Place a banana farm

questDialogKey4.Text: These are Minions and if there's one thing in the world they hate, it's being poked. Whatever you do, do not poke them with your finger.

questDialogKey5.Text: Okay, so maybe they actually like being poked. We were playing hard to get. Poke him again! Then tap a couple of empty spots on the ground to tell him where to go.

questDialogKey6.Text: These little guys are just full of surprises. And bananas.

questDialogKey7.Text: Now let's make this into a real party. Tap two Minions! (It's a small party.)

questDialogKey8.Text: Now try three Minions! We know. Counting is hard

questDialogKey9.Text: Now tap and hold anywhere on the board, and keep holding until you have selected all of your Minions! Minions are happier in groups, like fish or people who play the bongos.

upgradeMinionsQuestDialog.Text: Now that you have a Minion Level-Up Building, use these Minion Level-Up Tokens to upgrade your Minions.
